---
title: "Tocata: Inside's Death"
subtitle: "Bar Óxido"
date: "2026-05-29"
categories: 
  - "música"
  - "videos"
image: "banner.jpg"
format: html
---


:::: {.galeria}
![](tocata_1.jpeg){.fotito .lightbox group="tocata"}
![](tocata_3.jpeg){.fotito .lightbox group="tocata"}
![](tocata_4.jpeg){.fotito .lightbox group="tocata"}
![](tocata_5.jpeg){.fotito .lightbox group="tocata"}
:::

:::: {.centrar}
::: {.tiktok}
<iframe src="https://www.tiktok.com/embed/v2/7646230791546080532" height="740" width="400"></iframe>
:::
::::


::: {.foto .centrar}
![](afiche.jpg)
:::
